# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { Hono } from "jsr:@hono/hono";

type JsonPrimitive = string | number | boolean | null;
type JsonValue = JsonPrimitive | { [key: string]: JsonValue } | JsonValue[];

type UserRecord = {
  userId: string;
  email?: string;
  status?: string;
  role?: string;
  region?: string;
  age?: number;
  createdAt?: string;
  profile?: Record<string, JsonValue>;
  [key: string]: JsonValue | undefined;
};

const app = new Hono();
const kv = await Deno.openKv();

const RESERVED_QUERY_KEYS = new Set([
  "limit",
  "cursor",
  "userId",
  "prefix",
  "sort",
  "order",
]);

function json(data: unknown, status = 200) {
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data), {
    status,
    headers: { "content-type": "application/json; charset=utf-8" },
  });
}

function normalizeValue(value: string): string | number | boolean {
  if (value === "true") return true;
  if (value === "false") return false;
  if (/^-?\d+(\.\d+)?$/.test(value)) return Number(value);
  return value;
}

function sanitizeKeyPart(value: string): string {
  return value.trim();
}

function extractFilters(url: URL): Record<string, string> {
  const filters: Record<string, string> = {};
  for (const [key, value] of url.searchParams.entries()) {
    if (!RESERVED_QUERY_KEYS.has(key) && value.trim() !== "") {
      filters[key] = value;
    }
  }
  return filters;
}

function parseLimit(value: string | null): number {
  const n = value ? Number(value) : 50;
  if (!Number.isFinite(n) || n <= 0) return 50;
  return Math.min(n, 500);
}

function encodeCursor(key: Deno.KvKey): string {
  return btoa(JSON.stringify(key));
}

function decodeCursor(cursor: string | null): Deno.KvKey | undefined {
  if (!cursor) return undefined;
  try {
    return JSON.parse(atob(cursor)) as Deno.KvKey;
  } catch {
    return undefined;
  }
}

async function indexUser(user: UserRecord) {
  const userId = sanitizeKeyPart(user.userId);
  const primaryKey: Deno.KvKey = ["users", userId];
  const atomic = kv.atomic().set(primaryKey, user);

  for (const [field, raw] of Object.entries(user)) {
    if (field === "userId" || raw === undefined || raw === null) continue;
    if (typeof raw === "object") continue;
    const indexKey: Deno.KvKey = ["users", userId, field, raw];
    atomic.set(indexKey, primaryKey);
  }

  await atomic.commit();
}

async function removeUserIndexes(existing: UserRecord) {
  const userId = sanitizeKeyPart(existing.userId);
  const atomic = kv.atomic().delete(["users", userId]);

  for (const [field, raw] of Object.entries(existing)) {
    if (field === "userId" || raw === undefined || raw === null) continue;
    if (typeof raw === "object") continue;
    atomic.delete(["users", userId, field, raw]);
  }

  await atomic.commit();
}

async function searchUsers(params: {
  userId?: string | null;
  filters: Record<string, string>;
  limit: number;
  cursor?: Deno.KvKey;
}) {
  const { userId, filters, limit, cursor } = params;

  if (userId) {
    const normalizedUserId = sanitizeKeyPart(userId);
    if (Object.keys(filters).length === 0) {
      const res = await kv.get<UserRecord>(["users", normalizedUserId]);
      return {
        items: res.value ? [res.value] : [],
        cursor: null,
        scanned: res.value ? 1 : 0,
      };
    }

    const matchedEntries = [];
    let scanned = 0;

    for (const [field, raw] of Object.entries(filters)) {
      const value = normalizeValue(raw);
      const key: Deno.KvKey = ["users", normalizedUserId, sanitizeKeyPart(field), value];
      const entry = await kv.get<Deno.KvKey>(key);
      scanned++;
      matchedEntries.push(Boolean(entry.value));
    }

    if (matchedEntries.every(Boolean)) {
      const res = await kv.get<UserRecord>(["users", normalizedUserId]);
      return {
        items: res.value ? [res.value] : [],
        cursor: null,
        scanned,
      };
    }

    return { items: [], cursor: null, scanned };
  }

  const filterEntries = Object.entries(filters);

  if (filterEntries.length === 0) {
    const iter = kv.list<UserRecord>({
      prefix: ["users"],
      start: cursor,
    }, { limit });

    const items: UserRecord[] = [];
    let lastKey: Deno.KvKey | null = null;
    let scanned = 0;

    for await (const entry of iter) {
      if (entry.key.length !== 2) continue;
      items.push(entry.value);
      lastKey = entry.key;
      scanned++;
      if (items.length >= limit) break;
    }

    return {
      items,
      cursor: lastKey ? encodeCursor(lastKey) : null,
      scanned,
    };
  }

  const [firstField, firstRaw] = filterEntries[0];
  const firstValue = normalizeValue(firstRaw);
  const prefix: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];

  const iter = kv.list<Deno.KvKey>({ prefix }, { limit: Math.max(limit * 10, 100) });
  const items: UserRecord[] = [];
  let scanned = 0;
  let lastKey: Deno.KvKey | null = null;

  for await (const entry of iter) {
    scanned++;
    const key = entry.key;

    if (key.length !== 4) continue;
    if (key[2] !== firstField || key[3] !== firstValue) continue;

    const userPrimaryKey = entry.value;
    if (!Array.isArray(userPrimaryKey)) continue;

    const userIdFromKey = String(userPrimaryKey[1]);
    let matched = true;

    for (let i = 1; i < filterEntries.length; i++) {
      const [field, raw] = filterEntries[i];
      const value = normalizeValue(raw);
      const exists = await kv.get(["users", userIdFromKey, sanitizeKeyPart(field), value]);
      scanned++;
      if (!exists.value) {
        matched = false;
        break;
      }
    }

    if (!matched) continue;

    const user = await kv.get<UserRecord>(userPrimaryKey);
    scanned++;
    if (user.value) {
      items.push(user.value);
      lastKey = key;
      if (items.length >= limit) break;
    }
  }

  return {
    items,
    cursor: lastKey ? encodeCursor(lastKey) : null,
    scanned,
  };
}

app.get("/", () => json({ ok: true, service: "edge-kv-api" }));

app.post("/users", async (c) => {
  const body = await c.req.json<UserRecord>();
  if (!body?.userId || typeof body.userId !== "string") {
    return json({ error: "userId is required" }, 400);
  }

  const user: UserRecord = {
    ...body,
    userId: sanitizeKeyPart(body.userId),
    createdAt: body.createdAt ?? new Date().toISOString(),
  };

  const existing = await kv.get<UserRecord>(["users", user.userId]);
  if (existing.value) {
    await removeUserIndexes(existing.value);
  }

  await indexUser(user);
  return json({ ok: true, user }, existing.value ? 200 : 201);
});

app.get("/users/:userId", async (c) => {
  const userId = sanitizeKeyPart(c.req.param("userId"));
  const res = await kv.get<UserRecord>(["users", userId]);
  if (!res.value) return json({ error: "not found" }, 404);
  return json(res.value);
});

app.delete("/users/:userId", async (c) => {
  const userId = sanitizeKeyPart(c.req.param("userId"));
  const res = await kv.get<UserRecord>(["users", userId]);
  if (!res.value) return json({ error: "not found" }, 404);
  await removeUserIndexes(res.value);
  return json({ ok: true });
});

app.get("/search/users", async (c) => {
  const url = new URL(c.req.url);
  const userId = url.searchParams.get("userId");
  const limit = parseLimit(url.searchParams.get("limit"));
  const filters = extractFilters(url);
  const cursor = decodeCursor(url.searchParams.get("cursor"));

  const result = await searchUsers({
    userId,
    filters,
    limit,
    cursor,
  });

  return json(result);
});

Deno.serve(app.fetch);
